name: 15 Min Lemon Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the powdered sugar, graham cracker crumbs, and melted butter. Press into a crust and bake according to your preferred method.
2. Mix the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually blend in half a cup of milk until smooth and creamy.
3. Add the remaining milk and lemon pudding mix. Beat slowly with an egg beater for one minute. Do not overbeat.
4. Pour into the cooled crust and chill.
